title: DDoSDefender
description: Injects a sophisticated custom network handler into the network pipeline to protect your server from Malicious Clients.
body:
Development has moved to a Premium Model
To receive continued updates and support, please visit our new home.

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- **DDoSDefender** delivers high-performance mitigation by injecting a **sophisticated network handler** directly into your server’s Netty pipeline. By inspecting handshake packets and source IP addresses in real time, the system applies dynamic **rate limiting** and selective **packet cancellation** to neutralise malicious bursts instantly. Furthermore, **DDoSDefender** intercepts LoginStart packets using a **state-of-the-art detection suite** that executes 14 individual heuristic checks, achieving a near-perfect **99.997% bot detection rate** without sacrificing performance. *This figure is based on two separate controlled tests, each involving 10,000 bots using varied naming schemes.* ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2881511fc48443473ca01cd565eccaf3ae11b5a4.png) ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a421482686155a96c2d0a7db942e06e7e182bcb8.png) ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e0198137ae63b5dbdaefdac211cd2c337eabc97.png) **DDoSDefender** features our proprietary **"FastPass"** system, which allows previously verified players to bypass security checks on subsequent logins. This **rewards your community** with **seamless connections** while keeping your **server protected** from disruptions. /iudexindustries FastPass add . (Run as an op if a Player cannot join) *DDoSDefender focuses exclusively on managing and filtering application-level connection attempts. It is important to note that it does not—and cannot—protect your physical network infrastructure, as no software-level plugin can mitigate volumetric attacks at the ISP level.* *For comprehensive protection, we strongly recommend a layered security strategy: pair DDoSDefender/DDoSDefenderLite with a network-level proxy like TCPShield. While TCPShield shields your IP and absorbs massive network-layer floods, DDoSDefender provides the "last mile" of defence by intelligently filtering the complex, Minecraft-specific handshake exploits that proxies might pass through.*
